name: Brownie Sundaes with Honey Berry Sauce-NHB
recipeIngredient: 2 cups raspberries, fresh or frozen and thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the honey, lemon juice, and lemon peel. Mix well.
2. Gently fold in the berries.
3. To assemble, place brownies on serving plates.
4. Top each with 1/2 cup of frozen yogurt or ice cream.
5. Drizzle with 1/2 cup of sauce.
6. Serving suggestions: The sauce may also be served over pound cake, waffles, or crêpes.
[Makes 4 servings. Nutrients Per Serving (analyzed using low-fat frozen yogurt): Calories: 532 Sodium: 217 mg Carbohydrates: 105 g Protein: 9.03 g Cholesterol: 14.7 mg Dietary Fiber: 2.46 g Total Fat: 11.6 g Calories from Fat: 19%]
